name: kcalc
description: KCalc has everything you would expect from a scientific calculator, plus: - Trigonometric functions, logic operations and statistical calculations - A results stack which enables convenient recall of previous calculation results - Precision is user-definable - The display allows cut and paste of numbers - The display colors and font are configurable, aiding usability - The use of key-bindings make it easy to use without a pointing device This tool is part of the KDE Utils Suite.
